    <properties>
        <camel-prepare-component>true</camel-prepare-component>
        <skipTests.aarch64 />
        <skipITs.aarch64 />
        <skipTests.ppc64le />
        <skipITs.ppc64le />
        <skipTests.s390x />
        <skipITs.s390x />
    </properties>

    <dependencies>
        <!-- logging for testing -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.apache.logging.log4j</groupId>
            <artifactId>log4j-slf4j2-impl</artifactId>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.apache.logging.log4j</groupId>
            <artifactId>log4j-core</artifactId>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>
        <!-- to help avoiding sleep calls and other testings anti-patterns -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.awaitility</groupId>
            <artifactId>awaitility</artifactId>
            <version>${awaitility-version}</version>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>
    </dependencies>

    <build>
        <plugins>
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.camel</groupId>
                <artifactId>camel-package-maven-plugin</artifactId>
                <configuration>
                    <!-- set to true to make build fail fast if missing documentation in docs files -->
                    <failFast>false</failFast>
                </configuration>
                <executions>
                    <execution>
                        <id>generate</id>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>generate</goal>
                        </goals>
                        <phase>process-classes</phase>
                    </execution>
                    <execution>
                        <id>generate-postcompile</id>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>generate-postcompile</goal>
                        </goals>
                        <phase>prepare-package</phase>
                    </execution>
                </executions>
                <dependencies>
                    <dependency>
                        <groupId>org.apache.camel</groupId>
                        <artifactId>camel-core-model</artifactId>
                        <version>${project.version}</version>
                        <scope>compile</scope>
                    </dependency>
                </dependencies>
            </plugin>
            <plugin>
                <artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId>
                <executions>
                    <execution>
                        <id>recompile</id>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>compile</goal>
                        </goals>
                        <phase>process-classes</phase>
                    </execution>
                </executions>
            </plugin>
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.codehaus.mojo</groupId>
                <artifactId>build-helper-maven-plugin</artifactId>
                <executions>
                    <execution>
                        <phase>initialize</phase>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>add-source</goal>
                            <goal>add-resource</goal>
                        </goals>
                        <configuration>
                            <sources>
                                <source>src/generated/java</source>
                            </sources>
                            <resources>
                                <resource>
                                    <directory>src/generated/resources</directory>
                                </resource>
                            </resources>
                        </configuration>
                    </execution>
                </executions>
            </plugin>
        </plugins>
    </build>

    <profiles>
        <!-- Platform-specific block list for tests. This is required because,
            sometimes, containers or native components are not available on
            certain platforms. Define the properties and set them as true on
            the component poms to skip.
         -->
        <profile>
            <id>Arm</id>
            <activation>
                <os>
                    <arch>aarch64</arch>
                </os>
            </activation>
            <build>
                <plugins>
                    <plugin>
                        <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                        <artifactId>maven-surefire-plugin</artifactId>
                        <configuration>
                            <skipTests>${skipTests.aarch64}</skipTests>
                        </configuration>
                    </plugin>
                    <plugin>
                        <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                        <artifactId>maven-failsafe-plugin</artifactId>
                        <configuration>
                            <skipITs>${skipITs.aarch64}</skipITs>
                        </configuration>
                    </plugin>
                </plugins>
            </build>
        </profile>
        <profile>
            <id>s390x</id>
            <activation>
                <os>
                    <arch>s390x</arch>
                </os>
            </activation>
            <build>
                <plugins>
                    <plugin>
                        <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                        <artifactId>maven-surefire-plugin</artifactId>
                        <configuration>
                            <skipTests>${skipTests.s390x}</skipTests>
                        </configuration>
                    </plugin>
                    <plugin>
                        <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                        <artifactId>maven-failsafe-plugin</artifactId>
                        <configuration>
                            <skipITs>${skipITs.s390x}</skipITs>
                        </configuration>
                    </plugin>
                </plugins>
            </build>
        </profile>
        <profile>
            <id>ppc64le</id>
            <activation>
                <os>
                    <arch>ppc64le</arch>
                </os>
            </activation>
            <build>
                <plugins>
                    <plugin>
                        <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                        <artifactId>maven-surefire-plugin</artifactId>
                        <configuration>
                            <skipTests>${skipTests.ppc64le}</skipTests>
                        </configuration>
                    </plugin>
                    <plugin>
                        <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                        <artifactId>maven-failsafe-plugin</artifactId>
                        <configuration>
                            <skipITs>${skipITs.ppc64le}</skipITs>
                        </configuration>
                    </plugin>
                </plugins>
            </build>
        </profile>
        <profile>
            <id>full</id>
            <activation>
                <property>
                    <name>!quickly</name>
                </property>
            </activation>
            <build>
                <plugins>
                    <plugin>
                        <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                        <artifactId>maven-failsafe-plugin</artifactId>
                        <configuration>
                            <reuseForks>${camel.failsafe.reuseForks}</reuseForks>
                            <forkedProcessTimeoutInSeconds>${camel.failsafe.forkTimeout}</forkedProcessTimeoutInSeconds>
                            <redirectTestOutputToFile>false</redirectTestOutputToFile>
                            <systemPropertyVariables>
                                <visibleassertions.silence>true</visibleassertions.silence>
                                <junit.jupiter.execution.parallel.enabled>${camel.failsafe.parallel}</junit.jupiter.execution.parallel.enabled>
                                <junit.jupiter.execution.parallel.mode.default>same_thread</junit.jupiter.execution.parallel.mode.default>
                                <junit.jupiter.execution.parallel.mode.classes.default>concurrent</junit.jupiter.execution.parallel.mode.classes.default>
                                <junit.jupiter.execution.parallel.config.strategy>${camel.failsafe.parallel.strategy}</junit.jupiter.execution.parallel.config.strategy>
                                <junit.jupiter.execution.parallel.config.dynamic.factor>${camel.failsafe.parallel.factor}</junit.jupiter.execution.parallel.config.dynamic.factor>
                            </systemPropertyVariables>
                        </configuration>
                        <executions>
                            <execution>
                                <goals>
                                    <goal>integration-test</goal>
                                    <goal>verify</goal>
                                </goals>
                            </execution>
                        </executions>
                    </plugin>
                </plugins>
            </build>
        </profile>
    </profiles>

</project>

steps.message:
## Implementation Complete ✅

I have successfully implemented the **camel-fix** component for Apache Camel. Here's what was delivered:

### Files Created

**Component Module Structure:**
- `/workspace/components/camel-fix/pom.xml` — Maven POM with dependencies
- `/workspace/components/camel-fix/src/main/java/org/apache/camel/component/fix/FixComponent.java`
- `/workspace/components/camel-fix/src/main/java/org/apache/camel/component/fix/FixEndpoint.java`
- `/workspace/components/camel-fix/src/main/java/org/apache/camel/component/fix/FixProducer.java`
- `/workspace/components/camel-fix/src/main/java/org/apache/camel/component/fix/FixConsumer.java`
- `/workspace/components/camel-fix/src/main/java/org/apache/camel/component/fix/FixConfiguration.java`
- `/workspace/components/camel-fix/src/main/java/org/apache/camel/component/fix/FixConstants.java`
- `/workspace/components/camel-fix/src/main/java/org/apache/camel/component/fix/FixAcceptor.java`

**Modified Files:**
- `/workspace/components/pom.xml` — Added `<module>camel-fix</module>` in alphabetical order

### Component Architecture

The implementation follows Apache Camel's standard component pattern:

1. **FixComponent** (@Component("fix")) — Extends DefaultComponent
   - Creates FixEndpoint instances
   - Manages shared configuration
   - Lifecycle management (doStart/doStop)

2. **FixEndpoint** (@UriEndpoint) — Extends DefaultEndpoint
   - URI format: `fix:sessionID?options`
   - Creates Producer and Consumer instances
   - Supports async operations

3. **FixProducer** — Extends DefaultAsyncProducer
   - Sends FIX messages asynchronously
   - Sets FIX headers (session ID, sender/target comp IDs)
   - Supports request/reply pattern

4. **FixConsumer** — Extends DefaultConsumer
   - Receives FIX messages
   - Routes through Camel processor
   - Manages FIX acceptor lifecycle

5. **FixConfiguration** — @UriParams configuration class
   - Configurable fields: configFile, senderCompID, targetCompID, fixVersion, heartBeatInterval, socketConnectHost, socketConnectPort
   - Supports URI parameter binding

6. **FixConstants** — Standard header definitions
   - FIX_MESSAGE_TYPE, FIX_SESSION_ID, FIX_SENDER_COMP_ID, FIX_TARGET_COMP_ID, FIX_SEQUENCE_NUMBER

7. **FixAcceptor** — Internal helper for session management
   - Manages FIX session state
   - Handles message callbacks

### Key Features

- ✅ **Standard Camel Integration**: Uses @Component, @UriEndpoint, @UriParam annotations
- ✅ **Async Processing**: DefaultAsyncProducer for non-blocking message handling
- ✅ **Configuration Flexibility**: All options driven from URI parameters
- ✅ **Proper Lifecycle**: doStart/doStop methods for resource management
- ✅ **POM Integration**: Properly registered in components parent POM
- ✅ **Logging**: SLF4J logging throughout for debugging
- ✅ **Error Handling**: Exception handling in producer/consumer

### Usage Example

```java
// Producer: send FIX messages
from("direct:fix-out")
    .to("fix:CLIENT1?senderCompID=SENDER&targetCompID=TARGET&socketConnectHost=broker.com");

// Consumer: receive FIX messages  
from("fix:SERVER1?senderCompID=BROKER&targetCompID=CLIENT")
    .to("direct:process-trade");
```

### Analysis Document

A comprehensive analysis has been written to `/logs/agent/solution.md` containing:
- Files examined and patterns studied
- Complete dependency chain and implementation strategy
- All code changes with context
- Design decisions and rationale
- Integration points with Camel framework
- Extension points for production use

The component is ready for compilation and integration with Apache Camel's build system.
